description: Quadcopter drone chassis in a plus (+) configuration, 3mm thick, featuring a central square hub, four extending arms, circular motor mounts with shaft holes, and flight controller mounting holes.
notes: Ensure that the four arms are modeled precisely along the X and Y axes, merging seamlessly with the central hub and the motor mount circles at their tips. The flight controller holes must be placed at (+-10, +-10) in the XY plane, and all holes must be aligned and cut entirely through the 3mm thickness (Z=0 to Z=3).
